user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view candidates placed on hold with all details and On Hold interview status, so that I can track candidates whose progression is paused
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the On Hold Candidates screen; When the list loads; Then on-hold candidates are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search on-hold candidates by name, so that I can quickly find a specific paused candidate
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the On Hold Candidates screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the on-hold list, so that I see the latest on-hold candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the On Hold Candidates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to switch to other hiring stage filters such as In-Review, Interview and Offered, so that I can move a candidate off hold into the pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the On Hold Candidates screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count
